name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Participants

VARIABLES state, votes

TypeOK == /\ state \in {"INIT", "PREPARED", "COMMITTED", "ABORTED"}
        /\ votes \in [Participants -> {"YES", "NO"}]

Init == /\ state = "INIT"
       /\ votes = [p \in Participants |-> "YES"]

Prepare == /\ state = "INIT"
          /\ state' = "PREPARED"

VoteYes == /\ state = "PREPARED"
          /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "YES"]

VoteNo == /\ state = "PREPARED"
         /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "NO"]

Commit == /\ state = "PREPARED"
         /\ votes = [p \in Participants |-> "YES"]
         /\ state' = "COMMITTED"

Abort == /\ state = "PREPARED"
        /\ votes /= [p \in Participants |-> "YES"]
        /\ state' = "ABORTED"

Next == \/ Prepare
       \/ VoteYes
       \/ VoteNo
       \/ Commit
       \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, votes>> /\ TypeOK

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks are represented as a set of indices of philosophers who currently hold them *)
(* State is a sequence of length N where each entry is one of "thinking", "hungry", or "eating" *)

TypeOK == /\ forks \in SUBSET {1..N}
          /\ state \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

Init == /\ forks = {}
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ \* Philosopher i picks up left fork
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ state[i] = "hungry"
                /\ ~(i \in forks)
                /\ Left(i) \in forks
                /\ forks' = forks \cup {i}
                /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
          \/ \* Philosopher i picks up right fork
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ state[i] = "hungry"
                /\ ~(i \in forks)
                /\ Right(i) \notin forks
                /\ forks' = forks \cup {i}
                /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
          \/ \* Philosopher i puts down left fork
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ state[i] = "eating"
                /\ i \in forks
                /\ forks' = forks \ {i}
                /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
          \/ \* Philosopher i puts down right fork
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
                /\ state[i] = "eating"
                /\ i \in forks
                /\ forks' = forks \ {i}
                /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>> /\ WF_<<forks, state>>(Next)

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

TypeOK == /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K

Next == \/ /\ size < K
          /\ head' = head
          /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
          /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
          /\ size' = size + 1
        \/ /\ size > 0
          /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
          /\ tail' = tail
          /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
          /\ size' = size - 1
        \/ /\ size = 0
          /\ head' = head
          /\ tail' = tail
          /\ q' = q
          /\ size' = size

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>> /\ TypeOK

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS NULL, Server

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = [s \in Server |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [s \in Server |-> "Follower"]

Next == \/ \E s \in Server:
          /\ state[s] = "Follower"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
          /\ state' = state
        \/ \E s \in Server:
          /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
          /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
          /\ state' = state
        \/ \E s \in Server:
          /\ state[s] = "Leader"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
          /\ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLE readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = 0
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers + 1
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
       \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
       \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Process

VARIABLES state, channel, snapshot, markerSent

Init == /\ state = [p \in Process |-> "active"]
        /\ channel = [p \in Process |-> [q \in Process \ {p} |-> <<>>]]
        /\ snapshot = [p \in Process |-> [q \in Process \ {p} |-> "unknown"]]
        /\ markerSent = [p \in Process |-> [q \in Process \ {p} |-> FALSE]]

Next == \/ /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "recorded"]
          /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![p] = [q \in Process \ {p} |-> "unknown"]]
          /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![p] = [q \in Process \ {p} |-> TRUE]]
          /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![p][q] = Append(channel[p][q], "marker")]
        \/ /\ \E p, q \in Process : /\ channel[p][q] /= <<>>
            /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![p][q] = Tail(channel[p][q])]
            /\ IF state[p] = "active" /\ snapshot[p][q] = "unknown" THEN
                /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "recorded"]
                /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![p] = [q \in Process \ {p} |-> "unknown"]]
                /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![p] = [q \in Process \ {p} |-> TRUE]]
                /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![p][q] = Append(channel[p][q], "marker")]

                /\ state' = state
                /\ snapshot' = snapshot
                /\ markerSent' = markerSent
            /\ IF snapshot[p][q] = "unknown" THEN
                /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![p][q] = channel[p][q]]

                /\ snapshot' = snapshot
            /\ channel' = channel

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, snapshot, markerSent>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, FiniteMaps, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

TypeOK == store \in [Keys -> Values]

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> 0]

Next == \/ /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
          /\ k \in Keys
          /\ v \in Values
        \/ /\ store' = store
          /\ k \in Keys
          /\ v = store[k]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PaxosConsensus ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V, NULL

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen

TypeOK == acceptors \in [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]] /\
          proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]] /\
          chosen \in V

Init == acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]] /\
        proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]] /\
        chosen = NULL

Prepare(p) == /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p] = [ballot |-> proposers[p].ballot + 1, value |-> proposers[p].value]] /\ acceptors' = acceptors

Promise(p) == /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> acceptors[i].ballot, value |-> acceptors[i].value]] /\ proposers' = [i \in 1..M |-> IF proposers[i].ballot = acceptors[i].ballot THEN [ballot |-> proposers[i].ballot, value |-> acceptors[i].value] ELSE proposers[i]]

Accept(p) == /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p] = [ballot |-> proposers[p].ballot, value |-> proposers[p].value]] /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> proposers[p].ballot, value |-> proposers[p].value]]

Chosen(v) == /\ chosen' = v /\ acceptors' = acceptors

Next == \/ \E p \in 1..M: /\ proposers[p].value = NULL /\ Prepare(p)
        \/ \E p \in 1..M: /\ proposers[p].value # NULL /\ Promise(p)
        \/ \E p \in 1..M: /\ proposers[p].value # NULL /\ Accept(p)
        \/ \E v \in V: /\ chosen = NULL /\ Chosen(v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, chosen>> /\ TypeOK

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS File, ChunkSize, MaxRetries, Timeout
VARIABLES acked, chunks, nextChunk, retransmits, sent, state, timer

    /\ chunks \in Seq(Seq(File))
    /\ sent \in SUBSET 1..Len(chunks)
    /\ acked \in SUBSET 1..Len(chunks)
    /\ retransmits \in Seq(1..MaxRetries)
    /\ timer \in 0..Timeout
    /\ state \in {"Idle", "Sending", "WaitingAck"}
    /\ nextChunk \in 1..Len(chunks) \/ nextChunk = Len(chunks) + 1

Init ==
    /\ chunks = ChunkSequence(File, ChunkSize)
    /\ sent = {}
    /\ acked = {}
    /\ retransmits = Rep(0, Len(chunks))
    /\ timer = Timeout
    /\ state = "Idle"
    /\ nextChunk = 1

SendChunk ==
    /\ state = "Idle"
    /\ nextChunk <= Len(chunks)
    /\ sent' = sent \cup {nextChunk}
    /\ retransmits' = Subst(retransmits, nextChunk, 0)
    /\ timer' = Timeout
    /\ state' = "Sending"
    /\ nextChunk' = nextChunk
    /\ UNCHANGED <<chunks, acked>>

WaitAck ==
    /\ state = "Sending"
    /\ timer' = Timeout
    /\ state' = "WaitingAck"
    /\ nextChunk' = nextChunk
    /\ UNCHANGED <<chunks, sent, acked, retransmits>>

AckReceived ==
    /\ state = "WaitingAck"
    /\ acked' = acked \cup {nextChunk}
    /\ state' = "Idle"
    /\ nextChunk' = nextChunk + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<chunks, sent, retransmits, timer>>

Retransmit ==
    /\ state = "WaitingAck"
    /\ timer' = Timeout
    /\ retransmits' = Subst(retransmits, nextChunk, RetransmitCount(retransmits, nextChunk) + 1)
    /\ state' = "Sending"
    /\ nextChunk' = nextChunk
    /\ UNCHANGED <<chunks, sent, acked>>

TimeoutTick ==
    /\ state = "WaitingAck"
    /\ timer > 0
    /\ timer' = timer - 1
    /\ state' = "WaitingAck"
    /\ nextChunk' = nextChunk
    /\ UNCHANGED <<chunks, sent, acked, retransmits>>

Next ==
    \/ SendChunk
    \/ WaitAck
    \/ AckReceived
    \/ Retransmit
    \/ TimeoutTick

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<chunks, sent, acked, retransmits, timer, state, nextChunk>>

---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS File, ChunkSize, MaxRetries, Timeout
    /\ chunks \in Seq(Seq(File))
    /\ sent \in SUBSET 1..Len(chunks)
    /\ acked \in SUBSET 1..Len(chunks)
    /\ retransmits \in Seq(1..MaxRetries)
    /\ timer \in 0..Timeout
    /\ state \in {"Idle", "Sending", "WaitingAck"}
    /\ nextChunk \in 1..Len(chunks) \/ nextChunk = Len(chunks) + 1

Init ==
    /\ chunks = ChunkSequence(File, ChunkSize)
    /\ sent = {}
    /\ acked = {}
    /\ retransmits = Rep(0, Len(chunks))
    /\ timer = Timeout
    /\ state = "Idle"
    /\ nextChunk = 1

SendChunk ==
    /\ state = "Idle"
    /\ nextChunk <= Len(chunks)
    /\ sent' = sent \cup {nextChunk}
    /\ retransmits' = Subst(retransmits, nextChunk, 0)
    /\ timer' = Timeout
    /\ state' = "Sending"
    /\ nextChunk' = nextChunk
    /\ UNCHANGED <<chunks, acked>>

WaitAck ==
    /\ state = "Sending"
    /\ timer' = Timeout
    /\ state' = "WaitingAck"
    /\ nextChunk' = nextChunk
    /\ UNCHANGED <<chunks, sent, acked, retransmits>>

AckReceived ==
    /\ state = "WaitingAck"
    /\ acked' = acked \cup {nextChunk}
    /\ state' = "Idle"
    /\ nextChunk' = nextChunk + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<chunks, sent, retransmits, timer>>

Retransmit ==
    /\ state = "WaitingAck"
    /\ timer' = Timeout
    /\ retransmits' = Subst(retransmits, nextChunk, RetransmitCount(retransmits, nextChunk) + 1)
    /\ state' = "Sending"
    /\ nextChunk' = nextChunk
    /\ UNCHANGED <<chunks, sent, acked>>

TimeoutTick ==
    /\ state = "WaitingAck"
    /\ timer > 0
    /\ timer' = timer - 1
    /\ state' = "WaitingAck"
    /\ nextChunk' = nextChunk
    /\ UNCHANGED <<chunks, sent, acked, retransmits>>

Next ==
    \/ SendChunk
    \/ WaitAck
    \/ AckReceived
    \/ Retransmit
    \/ TimeoutTick

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<chunks, sent, acked, retransmits, timer, state, nextChunk>>
